TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: pintriqan_’bu_Blhuy_枕頭山戰役
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == ryax pinlahang plaw mciriq Msbtunux/ 大豹群 Mngciq/ 馬武督群M'utu mrhuw tgleng 領導者 Mknazi-mrhuw Yukan Naaw, Kzyay-mrhuw Batu Iban, Temu Watan, Silung- mrhuw Watan Takun, Topa-mrhuw Selu Watan ita Tayal ga Msbtunux ru Mngciq msqutux phaban gmluw qmhzyaw hetay Gipun mzyup qyunam pinhluyan qhut sa rgyax Lupi ru qmul knus atuk. 1900 kawas 8 byacing bhyan ta tatak atuk nha. 21 ryax hetay Cyama taycyo taywi maras qutux cyutay tta Amupin ru triqun tayal. wal pqilun taycyo ru 8 hetay. mgyay wayal qu Gipun. yasa ryax qani tmlux cikay qu saxa nha. 1906 kawas 9 byacing ruruw pintriqan Topa Iga, Gipun kahul Toyen ting ruk titing tmu 1900 squliq hetay. 1907 kawas 5 byacing 5 ryax hetay Gipun ru ita Tayal memaw tboyak pciriq i 'bu Blhuy. ana sbu' tayhuw, teyurang hetay Gipun ini nha cyaziy mhul mhut qu ita tayal. 40 ryax tboyak pinriqan saxa nha Iga, qlung galun Gipun qu 'bu Blhuy. saxa nha pzyux balay qelis ru mhoqil. Gipun ga kya 200 msyaw hoqil. ita tayal memaw ini baqi pira wal mhogil ru tgelis. suruw lga wahan smhelaw Gipun qu tayal ru 8 byacing 19 ryax smwan sbalay qu Tayal Msbtunux. zyaw pcingan 事件後影響 suruw Iga kahul Thetun, Nanto tmwang kya mpuw kbhul squliq na hetay. cyugal byacing lga suqun nha pinhluyan qhut squ rgyax Lupi. kwara mtzyaw qani kaki' 2000 na hetay masuq tzyaw. ingay llyung Gogan hugan ru qalang Pyasan wal si tmaqi Gipun mgyay zik rrgyax. suruw nya lga si gluw mwah Kmukan mzyup mnayang maki' Kzyay. yasa sa qutux na piyang balay kblayan atuk knus ngu rhzyal.
S.PHON: == rjax pinlaħaŋ plaw mʦ~ʨiriq ms~ɕβtunux/ *** mŋʦ~ʨiq/ ****mʔutu mrħuw tɣleŋ *** mknazi-mrħuw jukan naaw, kzjaj-mrħuw βatu iβan, temu watan, s~ɕiluŋ- mrħuw watan takun, topa-mrħuw s~ɕelu watan ita tajal ɣa ms~ɕβtunux ru mŋʦ~ʨiq ms~ɕqutux pħaβan ɣmluw qmħzjaw ħetaj ɣipun mzjup qjunam pinħlujan qħut s~ɕa rɣjax lupi ru qmul knus~ɕ atuk. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ βħjan ta tatak atuk nħa. ** rjax ħetaj ʦ~ʨjama tajʦ~ʨjo tajwi maras~ɕ qutux ʦ~ʨjutaj tta amupin ru triqun tajal. wal pqilun tajʦ~ʨjo ru * ħetaj. mɣjaj wajal qu ɣipun. jas~ɕa rjax qani tmlux ʦ~ʨikaj qu s~ɕaxa nħa. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ruruw pintriqan topa iɣa, ɣipun kaħul tojen tiŋ ruk titiŋ tmu **** s~ɕquliq ħetaj. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax ħetaj ɣipun ru ita tajal memaw tβojak pʦ~ʨiriq i ʔβu βlħuj. ana s~ɕβuʔ tajħuw, tejuraŋ ħetaj ɣipun ini nħa ʦ~ʨjazij mħul mħut qu ita tajal. ** rjax tβojak pinriqan s~ɕaxa nħa iɣa, qluŋ ɣalun ɣipun qu ʔβu βlħuj. s~ɕaxa nħa pzjux βalaj qelis~ɕ ru mħoqil. ɣipun ɣa kja *** ms~ɕjaw ħoqil. ita tajal memaw ini βaqi pira wal mħoɣil ru tɣelis~ɕ. s~ɕuruw lɣa waħan s~ɕmħelaw ɣipun qu tajal ru * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax s~ɕmwan s~ɕβalaj qu tajal ms~ɕβtunux. zjaw pʦ~ʨiŋan ***** s~ɕuruw iɣa kaħul tħetun, nanto tmwaŋ kja mpuw kβħul s~ɕquliq na ħetaj. ʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa s~ɕuqun nħa pinħlujan qħut s~ɕqu rɣjax lupi. kwara mtzjaw qani kakiʔ **** na ħetaj mas~ɕuq tzjaw. iŋaj lljuŋ ɣoɣan ħuɣan ru qalaŋ pjas~ɕan wal s~ɕi tmaqi ɣipun mɣjaj zik rrɣjax. s~ɕuruw nja lɣa s~ɕi ɣluw mwaħ kmukan mzjup mnajaŋ makiʔ kzjaj. jas~ɕa s~ɕa qutux na pijaŋ βalaj kβlajan atuk knus~ɕ ŋu rħzjal.
S.FORM: == ryax pinlahang plaw mciriq Msbtunux/ 大豹群 Mngciq/ 馬武督群M'utu mrhuw tgleng 領導者 Mknazi-mrhuw Yukan Naaw, Kzyay-mrhuw Batu Iban, Temu Watan, Silung- mrhuw Watan Takun, Topa-mrhuw Selu Watan ita Tayal ga Msbtunux ru Mngciq msqutux phaban gmluw qmhzyaw hetay Gipun mzyup qyunam pinhluyan qhut sa rgyax Lupi ru qmul knus atuk. 1900 kawas 8 byacing bhyan ta tatak atuk nha. 21 ryax hetay Cyama taycyo taywi maras qutux cyutay tta Amupin ru triqun tayal. wal pqilun taycyo ru 8 hetay. mgyay wayal qu Gipun. yasa ryax qani tmlux cikay qu saxa nha. 1906 kawas 9 byacing ruruw pintriqan Topa Iga, Gipun kahul Toyen ting ruk titing tmu 1900 squliq hetay. 1907 kawas 5 byacing 5 ryax hetay Gipun ru ita Tayal memaw tboyak pciriq i 'bu Blhuy. ana sbu' tayhuw, teyurang hetay Gipun ini nha cyaziy mhul mhut qu ita tayal. 40 ryax tboyak pinriqan saxa nha Iga, qlung galun Gipun qu 'bu Blhuy. saxa nha pzyux balay qelis ru mhoqil. Gipun ga kya 200 msyaw hoqil. ita tayal memaw ini baqi pira wal mhogil ru tgelis. suruw lga wahan smhelaw Gipun qu tayal ru 8 byacing 19 ryax smwan sbalay qu Tayal Msbtunux. zyaw pcingan 事件後影響 suruw Iga kahul Thetun, Nanto tmwang kya mpuw kbhul squliq na hetay. cyugal byacing lga suqun nha pinhluyan qhut squ rgyax Lupi. kwara mtzyaw qani kaki' 2000 na hetay masuq tzyaw. ingay llyung Gogan hugan ru qalang Pyasan wal si tmaqi Gipun mgyay zik rrgyax. suruw nya lga si gluw mwah Kmukan mzyup mnayang maki' Kzyay. yasa sa qutux na piyang balay kblayan atuk knus ngu rhzyal.
S.PHON: == rjax pinlaħaŋ plaw mʦ~ʨiriq ms~ɕβtunux/ *** mŋʦ~ʨiq/ ****mʔutu mrħuw tɣleŋ *** mknazi-mrħuw jukan naaw, kzjaj-mrħuw βatu iβan, temu watan, s~ɕiluŋ- mrħuw watan takun, topa-mrħuw s~ɕelu watan ita tajal ɣa ms~ɕβtunux ru mŋʦ~ʨiq ms~ɕqutux pħaβan ɣmluw qmħzjaw ħetaj ɣipun mzjup qjunam pinħlujan qħut s~ɕa rɣjax lupi ru qmul knus~ɕ atuk. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ βħjan ta tatak atuk nħa. ** rjax ħetaj ʦ~ʨjama tajʦ~ʨjo tajwi maras~ɕ qutux ʦ~ʨjutaj tta amupin ru triqun tajal. wal pqilun tajʦ~ʨjo ru * ħetaj. mɣjaj wajal qu ɣipun. jas~ɕa rjax qani tmlux ʦ~ʨikaj qu s~ɕaxa nħa. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ruruw pintriqan topa iɣa, ɣipun kaħul tojen tiŋ ruk titiŋ tmu **** s~ɕquliq ħetaj. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax ħetaj ɣipun ru ita tajal memaw tβojak pʦ~ʨiriq i ʔβu βlħuj. ana s~ɕβuʔ tajħuw, tejuraŋ ħetaj ɣipun ini nħa ʦ~ʨjazij mħul mħut qu ita tajal. ** rjax tβojak pinriqan s~ɕaxa nħa iɣa, qluŋ ɣalun ɣipun qu ʔβu βlħuj. s~ɕaxa nħa pzjux βalaj qelis~ɕ ru mħoqil. ɣipun ɣa kja *** ms~ɕjaw ħoqil. ita tajal memaw ini βaqi pira wal mħoɣil ru tɣelis~ɕ. s~ɕuruw lɣa waħan s~ɕmħelaw ɣipun qu tajal ru * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax s~ɕmwan s~ɕβalaj qu tajal ms~ɕβtunux. zjaw pʦ~ʨiŋan ***** s~ɕuruw iɣa kaħul tħetun, nanto tmwaŋ kja mpuw kβħul s~ɕquliq na ħetaj. ʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa s~ɕuqun nħa pinħlujan qħut s~ɕqu rɣjax lupi. kwara mtzjaw qani kakiʔ **** na ħetaj mas~ɕuq tzjaw. iŋaj lljuŋ ɣoɣan ħuɣan ru qalaŋ pjas~ɕan wal s~ɕi tmaqi ɣipun mɣjaj zik rrɣjax. s~ɕuruw nja lɣa s~ɕi ɣluw mwaħ kmukan mzjup mnajaŋ makiʔ kzjaj. jas~ɕa s~ɕa qutux na pijaŋ βalaj kβlajan atuk knus~ɕ ŋu rħzjal.
